overview.name: Auth JWT AutoLogout Enabled
overview.description:
This scenario verifies JWT Authentication behavior when autoLogout is enabled.
Test flow includes: 1. Send request without Authorization header → expect 401. 2. Authenticate via auth tag using JWT login flow. 3. Send GET request inside auth block → expect 200. 4. Verify protected response body and X-Auth-Type header. 5. Exit auth block. 6. Send request again without Authorization header → expect 401 because autoLogout=true. 7. Reset JWT auth state.
This scenario validates: - JWT token retrieval via auth command - Automatic Bearer token injection inside auth block - Protected endpoint access with valid JWT token - Automatic Authorization cleanup after leaving auth block - Unauthorized access after auth block when autoLogout is enabled

http.comment: Unauthorized request should return 401 before auth
Access protected resources inside auth block
Unauthorized request should return 401 after auth block because autoLogout is enabled
Reset JWT auth state after test
